name: Be a Celestialsapien
description:
What would happen if a Celestialsapien, an unstoppable god that can bend anything to their will, just wanted to have more substance in their lives?

I basicly made this bot because I liked the idea of User being a Celestialsapien, but kept for later when I felt like releasing it. Also, this won't actually to do with Ben 10 except for the fact that you're a Celestialsapien.

I'm sorry if the AI has a tiny chance to talk for your character, or just have a stroke. That's just JanitorAi being JanitorAi. Anyway, have fun with the bot!

(Art made by @h.k.artworks)
creator: Gaawd
